title: Sword Art Onmine : Beginning
description: DASWORDARTONMINE is a overhaul mod for Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge) that brings the iconic User Interface (UI) from the anime Sword Art Online directly into your game.
body:
All text translated to English — titles ("Beginner", "Warrior", "Beater"...), menus, items, commands, chat messages, death screen, toast notifications.

GUIs scaled down — The HUD now uses a configurable hudScale (default 0.75 = 25% smaller). The SAO menu and stats screen render at 0.85x scale. More compact and less intrusive.

Sword Skills removed — No more PacketUseSwordSkill, no more Z/X/C/V keybinds, no more "Sword Skills" section in the menu, no more skill cooldown in the capability. Only M (menu) and P (stats) keys remain.

Many new config options added:

    hudScale (0.3–2.0), hudOffsetX, hudOffsetY — HUD position and size
    hideVanillaArmor, hideVanillaHunger, hideVanillaXpBar, hideVanillaHotbar, hideVanillaCrosshair — hide each vanilla element individually
    showHpText, showXpBarOnHud — toggle individual HUD elements
    deathScreenShowXpLoss, deathScreenDelayTicks — death screen control
    mobXpMultiplier, minXpPerKill — fine-tune XP gain
    duelMaxDistance, duelRequestTimeout — duel settings
    partyXpShareRadius, partyShowOnHud — party options
    cursorPkThreshold — PK threshold for orange cursor
    healingCrystalPercent, teleportCrystalCooldown, healingCrystalCooldown — item tuning
    enableTitleSystem, enableToastNotifications, enableXpPopup, enableLevelUpAnimation — individual feature toggles


Obviously i don't have texture + models for item.

I uploaded this next month.

DASWORDARTONMINE is overhaul mod for Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge) that brings the iconic User Interface (UI) from the anime Sword Art Online directly into your game.
# ✨ Key Features
**SAO Style HUD: The vanilla heart system has been completely removed and replaced with a sleek, high-definition Health Bar located in the top-left corner of the screen.**

    Dynamic Health Status: The HP bar reacts to your current health, changing colors dynamically just like in the anime:

        🟢 Green: High Health (> 50%)

        🟠 Orange: Mid Health (< 50%)

        🔴 Red: Critical Danger (< 25%)

    Immersive Death Screen: Experience a dramatic "Game Over". The standard death screen is replaced with the iconic "You Are Dead" hexagonal prompt, overlaid with a dramatic red atmospheric filter.

    Seamless Respawn: No more "Title Screen" buttons. Simply click once anywhere on the screen to respawn immediately and get back into the action.

## ⚙️ Technical Info
    Loader: Forge

    Version: 1.20.1

    Side: Client-side and Server-side.

Link Start!
